items.title: The AI threat wrecked software stocks. Now financial stocks look next with LPL closing 8% lower
items.description: Financial services firms tanked after the launch of a new AI-powered tax planning tool that promises to do the work "within minutes."

items.title: This stock got caught up in the software drawdown. Goldman says it’s insulated from AI threat
items.description: Goldman Sachs sees shares of Samsara rising about 30% from current levels.

items.title: Robinhood tanks on revenue miss and ‘crypto jitters.’ Analysts say buy the dip
items.description: Most Wall Street analysts were prepared to look past a shortfall in revenue and focus instead on Robinhod's future growth profile.

items.title: Citi, JPMorgan downgrade Mattel after earnings miss and disappointing guidance
